title: Evacuation of Ciutric
content:

Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]'', it is possible to place the [[Stenax Massacres]] in 40:1 GrS. *[[Undercover operation on Axxila]][[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] yacht|''Baudo''-class star yacht]] **''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' |forces2=*1 [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] **[[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']] *1 [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]] **''[[Binder]]'' *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] *[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *[[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT walkers]] *[[Special Intelligence]] operatives |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Several commandos and fighters **[[Ibtisam]] *[[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] |casual2=*Few infantry *Heavy fighter losses *''Reckoning'' and ''Binder'' damaged |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Rogue Squadron present and accounted for, Admiral, what's the mission?''"
"''Long range recon and retrieval''"
"''High risk, I take it?''"
"''Most likely, which why I asked Rogue Squadron to be here.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]|[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]]}} In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] launched an '''attack''' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ciutric IV]], forcing a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] evacuation. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] failed in rescuing the former leader of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]]. ==Background== {{Quote|His rescue at our hands could show other Imperial leaders that they don't have to be devoured by a crumbling state.|[[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]]|}} [[File:Pestage_Tribunal.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Ysanne Isard accuses Sate Pestage of treason before the Tribunal.]] Following [[Grand Vizier/Legends|Grand Vizier]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] [[Undercover operation on Axxila|meeting]] with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]], [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]] informed the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Cabal]] of Pestage's [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. However, he managed to leave [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and fled to [[Ciutric IV]]. However, upon reaching the planet he was arrested by former [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] turned [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. She agreed to bargain Pestage's life with Isard and the Ruling Council then sent [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] to reclaim Pestage. Meanwhile, a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|Rebel intelligence]] [[X14|agent]] on Ciutric IV informed [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] of Pestage's situation and the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] decided to send a rescue team for Pestage. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was to team up with [[Aggressor Wing]] and a ground force, [[Commando Team One]], to get Pestage off of Ciutric. ==The battle== {{Quote|Rogue Squadron has long been the heart of the Rebellion. Today we will tear it out and destroy it.|Admiral Delak Krennel|[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]]}} [[File:RescueSatePestage-XWing33.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Commando Team One attacks the city of Daplona.]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] provided air support while the [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] infiltrated the [[Daplona|city]] where Pestage was hiding. Several commandos extracted Pestage from the city and proceeded to escape in an evacuation transport. Escape from the planet, however, was prevented by a pair of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] under the command of Admiral [[Delak Krennel]], the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']] and [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Interdictor Star Destroyer]] ''[[Binder]]'' that just had arrived in the system. Aggressor Wing was able to escape to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], but Rogue Squadron, the commandos, and Pestage were caught in the Interdictor's gravity well and forced to go to ground on the planet's night side. With the retrieval force trapped on the planet, a squadron of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] ambushed the team, killing [[Ibtisam]] before being wiped out by the remaining Rogues. [[File:Reckoning_assault.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Aggressor Wing engages the ''Reckoning''.]] The following day, Rogue Squadron launched a desperate attack against the Imperial forces in orbit. As the battle was beginning, Aggressor Wing returned, along with [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik's]] ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', destroying many of the TIEs. The reinforced Republic force returned again to the surface to refuel and plan their escape. With the ''Skate'' and X-wings providing support, the Y-wing squadrons fired volleys of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] at the Star Destroyers, knocking out the ''Binder''{{'s}} gravity well projectors and causing artificial gravity to fail on the ''Reckoning''. Both Destroyers retreated, clearing the path for the Republic forces to escape. [[File:ATAT_Bantha.jpg|thumb|left|250px|An AT-AT attacks Commando Team One.]] On the surface, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] attacked Commando Team One before their [[Bantha-class troop carrier assault shuttle|''Bantha''-class troop carrier assault shuttles]] could launch. However, both shuttles managed to escape in the fighting. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|She gave up her future to us. It is an investment in who we are and what we value. What we do with it, what we make of it will determine the ultimate value if what her life will mean. So to you, Ibtisam, and all our comrades, farewell. Though our struggle with the Empire continues, you brought it that much closer to an end. And when it is gone, you and your courage will be remembered and live on forever.|Wedge Antilles, speaking at Ibtisam's funeral|}} In the confusion, Pestage fled his rescuers, intending for Krennel to command the [[Ciutric Hegemony]] in his name. Krennel instead strangled Pestage with his [[Cybernetics/Legends|artificial right hand]] and seized complete control of the Hegemony. On Coruscant, Ysanne Isard assassinated and imprisoned the leaders of the Cabal, becoming the undisputed leader of the Empire. ==Behind the scenes== The cover of [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] incorrectly shows the [[Eidolon (Strike-class)|''Eidolon'']] during the battle. ==Appearances== *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] {{1st}} {{Co}} *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''Star Wars Handbook'' 1: ''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']] {{1stm}} {{Imo}} *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|73|ANT 3-4|Wedge Antilles}} *{{FactFile|108|PUL 1-2|''Pulsar Skate''}} *{{FactFile|139|PES 1-4|Sate Pestage}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|see "Ciutric"}} *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Legacy Collection|packtype=''Star Wars'' Comic Pack|pack=#14: Wedge Antilles & Borsk Fey'lya (''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' #32)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TLCcomicpacks14.asp}} *{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|23|Star Wars A–Z}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 5 ABY}} {{Interlang |es=Evacuación de Ciutric }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ciutric, evacuation of}} [[Category:Battles of Ciutric IV]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Evacuations]]
